system.description:
The study of nature and technology.
  • Predicting the weather: Natural Philosophy/EDU 12+
  • Knowing an esoteric scientific principle like the volume of gas increases as its temperature increases: Natural Philosophy/EDU 8+
  • Understanding a creature's place in the local ecology based on its fossilized teeth: Natural Philosophy/EDU 10+
  • Designing a working glider: Natural Philosophy/EDU 12+
  • Predicting a solar eclipse: Natural Philosophy/EDU 12+
system.shortdescr: Study of nature, science, and technology.
